capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Is there a governance management service in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a governance management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the governance management service adopted enterprise-wide as a reference for policy and procedure creations?
questions.intent: Evaluate enterprise-wide adoption of the governance management service
questions.evaluation_focus: Operating model, stakeholders, and delivery cadence

questions.prompt: How frequently is the governance service reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate review cadence for the governance management service

questions.prompt: What are the documented governance metrics that specifically are relevant to enterprise security?
questions.intent: Identify documented governance metrics relevant to enterprise security
questions.evaluation_focus: Defined KPIs/KRIs tied to governance outcomes

questions.prompt: How frequently are the metrics reviewed?
Is there a dedicated team in the enterprise that handles the governance and policy creation in the network? There must be separation of duties with the infrastructure and operations owners.
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a dedicated governance team exists with separation of duties
questions.evaluation_focus: Defined governance bodies, responsibilities, and decision scope

questions.prompt: As the enterprise matures, are governance team job descriptions reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether governance role descriptions are reviewed as the organization matures
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented RACI for key security decisions

questions.prompt: Does the governance team have a lead that is responsible for strategic decisions relating to governance?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether there is a governance leader accountable for strategic decisions
questions.evaluation_focus: Named leader with clear mandate and delegated authority

questions.prompt: Is there a user segmentation strategy utilized by the enterprise? Is the strategy used when segmenting technologies like the Active Directory?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a user segmentation strategy exists and is used for identity technologies
questions.evaluation_focus: Defined segmentation criteria (roles, privilege tiers, risk levels)

questions.prompt: Is this strategy formalized, documented and implemented enterprise-wide across all technology that needs user-based identity controls or is it implemented only in select locations informally?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether user segmentation strategy is formalized, documented, and enterprise-wide
questions.evaluation_focus: Governed lifecycle for user categories and access models

questions.prompt: As the enterprise matures, how frequently is the segmentation strategy reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate user segmentation strategy review frequency
questions.evaluation_focus: Alignment to policy requirements and identity governance processes

questions.prompt: Is there an application segmentation strategy utilized by the enterprise? Is the strategy used when segmenting applications in the data center?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an application segmentation strategy exists and is used for data center applications
questions.evaluation_focus: Defined micro-segmentation principles and target scope

questions.prompt: Is this strategy formalized, documented and implemented enterprise-wide across all technology that needs application-specific controls or is it implemented only in select locations informally?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application micro-segmentation strategy is formalized, documented, and enterprise-wide
questions.evaluation_focus: Enforcement design (policy-as-code, agents, service mesh, etc.)

questions.prompt: As the enterprise matures, how frequently is the segmentation strategy reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate application segmentation strategy review frequency
questions.evaluation_focus: Exception governance and measurement of effectiveness

questions.prompt: Is there a network segmentation strategy utilized by the enterprise? Is the strategy used when segmenting technologies like VLANs, VRFs, etc.?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a network segmentation strategy exists and is used for common network segmentation technologies
questions.evaluation_focus: Defined segmentation zones and allowable traffic patterns

questions.prompt: Is this strategy formalized, documented and implemented enterprise-wide across all technology that needs network isolation or is it implemented only in select locations informally?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network macro-segmentation strategy is formalized, documented, and enterprise-wide
questions.evaluation_focus: Control enforcement (firewalls, NAC, cloud segmentation, etc.)

questions.prompt: As the enterprise matures, how frequently is the segmentation strategy reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate network segmentation strategy review frequency
questions.evaluation_focus: Exception governance and monitoring of segmentation health

questions.prompt: Do all functions of enterprise governance have external sources like threat intelligence sources as reference to build policies and relevant compliance initiatives?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether governance uses external expert reference inputs such as threat intelligence
questions.evaluation_focus: Use of independent expertise or benchmarks to inform governance
